name: What does a finished knowledge graph actually help with?

mainEntity.name: What does a finished knowledge graph actually help with?

acceptedAnswer.text: The main outcome is a structured layer of entities and relationships that makes search, analytics, and AI retrieval more accurate. A strong graph can also improve content discovery, entity resolution, and the consistency of how your organization refers to the same real-world thing.
acceptedAnswer.description: It improves search, analytics, AI retrieval, entity resolution, and consistent data usage.

description: It improves search, analytics, AI retrieval, entity resolution, and consistent data usage.
